description: Log in to Moodle (http://localhost/moodle) as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). In the "Firefighter Certification Program" (FIRE101) course, add a SCORM package using the file at /home/ga/Documents/fire_safety_scorm.zip. Name the activity "Fire Safety Certification - Module 1" and set the description to "Mandatory fire safety training module covering basic fire prevention, evacuation procedures, and extinguisher operation." Configure the activity settings for a 'Highest grade' grading method, a maximum grade of 100, and 3 allowed attempts.
